text: I feel a sense of curiosity and reflection as I move from a modern, almost clinical conference room—where presence feels formal and anticipation lingers—to the vibrant, creative chaos of the R+D exhibit. The first space feels contained and ordered, perhaps sparking thoughts on the structures we build for dialogue. The second space is energetic and abstract, inviting wonder about progress and the role of human ingenuity. In both, I sense the ever-present tension between containment and creativity, a motif that seems to permeate the environments we inhabit and the ideas we explore.
